description: The application of theoretically and academically acquired knowledge to a civil and environmental engineering problem in as near "real-world" as possible.

prerequisites.prerequisites_text: Declared in Civil Engineering BS or Environmental Engineering BS and (CIV ENGR 414,426,427,428, 442,445,447,522,573,574,576,G L E/​CIV ENGR  530,532, or535)
